account.title: I have an account
account.desc: Team or family — sign in with your credentials.

consent.heading: Before you start
consent.body: This app records work activity on this computer so it can be shown to your employer. While running, it captures:
consent.item1: The active app and window title
consent.item4: Pages visited in your browser (via the extension)
consent.optOutBefore: You can turn off screenshots or keystroke counting anytime in
consent.optOutAfter: , and pause tracking from the tray icon.
